zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Franceis I于1195年出生在英国德比夏爾奧斯馬斯頓时，他的父亲Robert de Franceis II25岁，母亲Mabel de Luttchurch21岁。他与Agnes de Bradleye结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1242年在他的家乡享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Franceis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Francis  .

variants.name: Francis
meanings: English: from the Old French personal name Franceis, modern French François, from Latin Franciscus, originally ‘Frank’, though later used to denote a Frenchman. The personal name owed much of its popularity during the Middle Ages to the fame of Saint Francis of Assisi (1181–1226), whose baptismal name was actually Giovanni but who was nicknamed Francisco because his father was absent in France at the time of his birth. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Italian Francesco and Polish, Czech, Slovak, Slovenian, and Croatian Franc , and also their derivatives, e.g. Croatian Francišković (see Francisco 4).
English: ethnic name from the Old French adjective Franceis ‘French’ (see 1 above).
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames, or an adoption of the non-Jewish surname.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Franceis I was born in 1195, in Osmaston, Derbyshire, England, his father, Robert de Franceis II, was 25 and his mother, Mabel de Luttchurch, was 21. He married Agnes de Bradleye. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1242, in his hometown, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Franceis I est né en 1195, à Osmaston, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Franceis II, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mabel de Luttchurch, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Bradleye. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1242, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Franceis I 1195 in Osmaston, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Franceis II 25 und seine Mutter Mabel de Luttchurch 21. Er hat Agnes de Bradleye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1242 im Alter von 47 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Franceis I è nato il nel 1195 nel Osmaston, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Franceis II, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Mabel de Luttchurch, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Bradleye. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1242, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Franceis Iが1195年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアオスマストンで生まれた時，父Robert de Franceis IIは25歳，母Mabel de Luttchurchは21歳であった。Agnes de Bradleyeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1242年に故郷で47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Franceis I(이)가 1195년 영국 더비실르 오스마스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Franceis II(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabel de Luttchurch(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Agnes de Bradleye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1242년 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Franceis I nasceu em 1195, em Osmaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Franceis II, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mabel de Luttchurch, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Bradleye. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1242, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Franceis I родился в 1195 г. в местности осмастон, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Franceis II было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabel de Luttchurch, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Bradleye. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1242 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Franceis I nació en 1195, en Osmaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Franceis II, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mabel de Luttchurch, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Agnes de Bradleye. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1242, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años.
